text.title: accessibility-evaluation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for accessibility-evaluation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent generating alt="Description" placeholders that pass automated checks but fail SC 1.1.1 for decorative or context-specific images.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Placeholder alt text passes the "attribute present" check but fails the "alternative text conveys equivalent information" criterion. Require the agent to cite the source content the alt is derived from.

failure-mode.description: Agent fixing contrast by editing CSS variables without checking dark-mode token consistency.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Token-layer edits propagate to all modes. A contrast fix in light mode can create a new violation in dark mode. Require diffs with both modes regenerated.

failure-mode.description: Agent mass-adding aria-label to elements that already have visible text labels.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Adding aria-label to an element with visible text creates a SC 2.5.3 (Label in Name) violation if the label text differs. Lint for accessible-name vs visible-text mismatch before applying.

failure-mode.description: Agent closing findings as "won't fix" without a human accessibility lead sign-off with documented rationale.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Suppressed findings without rationale create phantom compliance. Legal and procurement reviewers will ask for documented risk acceptance; agents cannot provide it.

failure-mode.description: Scanning logged-out fallback pages instead of authenticated application states.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Authenticated pages have additional dynamic content, modals, and forms not visible to unauthenticated scans. Clean reports from unauthenticated pages are false negatives.
